title: Aureline branch-row, stash-row, and remote-tracking vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the branch-row and stash-row record family frozen in docs/vcs/git_state_and_worktree_contract.md. One record family pins which branch a surface is operating on (branch_row_record) including the branch class drawn from the closed eight-value vocabulary, the unpublished-commit-risk class drawn from the closed five-value vocabulary, the optional remote-tracking envelope (tracking ref id, last-known remote revision, ahead/behind counts, last-fetched timestamp, four-value remote_tracking_freshness_class), the linked worktree the branch is currently checked out in, the optional provider-review overlay block carrying the provider review-workspace ref and the closed three-value provider_overlay_visual_secondary_class so the chip is mechanically secondary, the closed five-value workset_cleanliness_class so sparse / cone / partial-clone surfaces label cleanliness honestly, the closed seven-value branch_recovery_action_class for branch-switch / worktree-remove / rebase admission, and the closed six-value branch_open_action_class for the open-action surface; one stash_row_record pins which stash a surface is operating on (stash class, base branch / worktree ref + base revision id ref both required, linked worktree, four-value stash_lifecycle_state). One audit stream (branch_row) carries the closed denial-reason and event-id vocabularies. Local Git is the authoritative truth; provider PR / MR overlays appear visually secondary only. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw stash payload bytes, raw provider rule bodies, and raw approval-ticket bodies MUST NOT appear on any record emitted against this schema; the record carries opaque ids, typed vocabulary, redaction-aware reviewable labels (<= 1024 graphemes), and policy / freshness / authority / lifecycle state only. The eventual git-service crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, branch class, unpublished-commit-risk class, remote-tracking-freshness class, workset-cleanliness class, provider-overlay visual-secondary class, branch-recovery-action class, branch-open-action class, stash class, stash-lifecycle state, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps branch_row_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

branch_row_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the branch-row and stash-row vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit / remote URLs, raw author identity strings, raw commit message bodies, raw patch bodies, raw stash payload bytes, and raw approval-ticket bodies never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload. Exporters MUST apply broker-owned redaction (ADR-0007) before the value crosses this boundary.

redaction_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Local-only branch / stash rows default to metadata_safe_default; rows that touched a credentialed flow MUST raise to operator_only_restricted; support exports MUST raise to internal_support_restricted.

freshness_class.description: Re-exported verbatim from schemas/governance/capability_lifecycle.schema.json (ADR-0011). Used by the branch-row / stash-row freshness chip; per-tracking-ref freshness lives in remote_tracking_freshness_class.

workspace_trust_state_class.description: Re-exported from ADR-0018. A topology-changing flow (branch switch with unpublished commits, worktree removal, in-progress operation abort) never appears available under unset_pending_decision; the schema enforces this through workspace_trust_unset_or_restricted denial.

policy_context.description: Policy context the record was minted under. ADR-0008 / ADR-0009 policy epoch and ADR-0001 / ADR-0018 trust state are re-validated on every restore and topology-changing mutation.

branch_class.description: Frozen branch-class vocabulary. local_branch_no_remote_tracking and detached_head_state_no_branch_label and imported_or_synthetic_branch_label MUST resolve remote_tracking_envelope to null; every other class MUST cite a non-null remote_tracking_envelope. local_branch_tracking_remote_ahead pairs with unpublished_commits_present_local_only; local_branch_tracking_remote_diverged pairs with unpublished_commits_present_diverged_with_remote.

unpublished_commit_risk_class.description: Frozen unpublished-commit-risk vocabulary. unpublished_commits_present_local_only and unpublished_commits_present_diverged_with_remote MUST pair with a branch_recovery_action_class other than recovery_no_action_required_no_unpublished_commits; a violation denies with branch_recovery_action_required_for_unpublished_commits.

remote_tracking_freshness_class.description: Frozen remote-tracking-ref freshness vocabulary. Independent from the provider-overlay freshness; this row covers the tracking ref only.

remote_tracking_ref_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the remote-tracking ref row. Raw remote names and raw branch names never appear here.

last_known_remote_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the last-known remote revision the tracking ref points at.

ahead_count.description: Count of local commits not yet on the tracking ref.

behind_count.description: Count of remote commits not yet on local.

remote_tracking_envelope.description: Remote-tracking envelope. Required (non-null) on every branch_class other than local_branch_no_remote_tracking, detached_head_state_no_branch_label, and imported_or_synthetic_branch_label.

workset_cleanliness_class.description: Frozen workset-cleanliness vocabulary. Anything other than full_worktree_cleanliness MUST surface the workset-limited cue on the chip; a row that renders 'clean' without the matching disclosure denies with workset_cleanliness_must_match_chip_disclosure.

provider_overlay_visual_secondary_class.description: Frozen provider-overlay visibility class. The chip is rendered as a secondary cue only; local Git is authoritative for the row class. A surface that renders the provider overlay as the primary label denies with provider_overlay_must_not_replace_local_branch_label.

provider_review_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the review_workspace_record (schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json) the overlay cites. Raw URLs, raw provider rule bodies, raw PR / MR titles, and raw remote names never appear here.

provider_overlay_visual_secondary.description: Provider-overlay visual-secondary block. Optional. When present, the row carries a non-null block; when absent, the row MUST resolve provider_overlay_visual_secondary to null. A row that renders a provider chip without citing the block denies with provider_overlay_chip_required_overlay_record.

branch_recovery_action_class.description: Frozen branch-recovery-action vocabulary. unpublished_commits_present_local_only and unpublished_commits_present_diverged_with_remote MUST resolve to a non-recovery_no_action_required_no_unpublished_commits value; a violation denies with branch_recovery_action_required_for_unpublished_commits.

branch_open_action_class.description: Frozen branch-open-action vocabulary. open_action_blocked_pending_in_progress_operation_resolution MUST cite the in-progress operation row through the bound worktree's in_progress_history_operation_state_id_ref; a missing ref denies with in_progress_operation_block_must_cite_state_record.

branch_row_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the branch_row audit stream.

branch_row_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the branch_row stream. branch_row_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a branch_row_denial_reason.

workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the workspace row in schemas/workspace/* the branch is bound to.

branch_label_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch label row. Raw branch names never appear here. detached_head_state_no_branch_label rows still carry an opaque ref pointing at the synthetic 'detached head' label so the row remains attributable.

remote_tracking_envelope.description: Required (non-null) when branch_class is one of local_branch_tracking_remote_in_sync, local_branch_tracking_remote_ahead, local_branch_tracking_remote_behind, local_branch_tracking_remote_diverged, or local_branch_tracking_remote_gone_upstream_deleted. Null when branch_class is local_branch_no_remote_tracking, detached_head_state_no_branch_label, or imported_or_synthetic_branch_label.

linked_worktree_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the worktree_row_record currently checked out on this branch. Null when no worktree currently owns the branch.

head_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch's head revision. Null when the branch label has not yet been pinned to a revision (e.g. an empty imported_or_synthetic_branch_label row before hydration).

change_object_id_refs.description: Opaque change-object id refs covering the unpublished commits on this branch (cited from schemas/vcs/change_object.schema.json). Empty array when unpublished_commit_risk_class is no_unpublished_commits_clean or unpublished_commits_not_applicable_no_tracking; non-empty when the row's risk class is one of the unpublished_commits_present_* values so the unpublished commits are reviewable through the change-stack contract.

provider_overlay_visual_secondary.description: Optional provider-overlay visual-secondary block. When present, the chip is rendered as a secondary cue only. A row that renders a provider chip without citing this block denies with provider_overlay_chip_required_overlay_record.

in_progress_history_operation_state_id_r.description: Opaque ref to the history_operation_state_record bound to this branch's worktree (when an in-progress operation is running). Required (non-null) when branch_open_action_class is open_action_blocked_pending_in_progress_operation_resolution; null otherwise.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row admitting the most recent topology-changing mutation on this branch. Required (non-null) on rows whose branch_open_action_class is open_action_check_out_branch_in_main_worktree paired with an unpublished_commits_present_* risk class; nullable on local-only edits.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the most recent mutation was invoked. Nullable on system-driven row mints; required (non-null) on switch / recovery-pin actions.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when the branch row has been archived. Null otherwise.

merge_conflict_class_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge / conflict-class contract. Currently always null.

history_edit_recovery_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the dedicated history-edit recovery contract. Currently always null.

allOf.description: Tracking branch_class values (in_sync / ahead / behind / diverged / gone_upstream_deleted) MUST cite a non-null remote_tracking_envelope; non-tracking branch_class values (local_branch_no_remote_tracking / detached_head_state_no_branch_label / imported_or_synthetic_branch_label) MUST cite null.

Unpublished commits present (local-only or diverged) MUST resolve branch_recovery_action_class to a non-recovery_no_action_required_no_unpublished_commits value; a row that admits a switch with unpublished commits and no recovery action denies with branch_recovery_action_required_for_unpublished_commits.
open_action_blocked_pending_in_progress_operation_resolution MUST cite a non-null in_progress_history_operation_state_id_ref so the block is mechanically attributable.

branch_row_record.description: Row shape consumed by the branch picker, the change-stack strip, the source-control panel, the AI branch-agent panel, the support / export bundle's git section, and audit lanes. Exactly one row per branch identity.

base_branch_or_worktree_ref.description: Opaque ref to the base branch / worktree the stash was minted against. Always non-null; a stash row that omits this ref denies with stash_base_ref_required_for_apply_admission.

base_revision_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the base revision the stash was minted at. Always non-null; a stash row that omits this ref denies with stash_base_ref_required_for_apply_admission.

linked_worktree_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the worktree_row_record the stash was minted in.

stashed_patch_stack_snapshot_ref.description: Opaque ref to the patch-stack snapshot row that holds the stashed payload. Optional; null when the stash is held through a local-history entry instead. Raw stash payload bytes never appear on this row.

stashed_local_history_entry_ref.description: Opaque ref to the local-history entry row that holds the stashed payload. Optional; null when the stash is held through a patch-stack snapshot instead.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval-ticket row admitting the apply / drop action. Required (non-null) when stash_lifecycle_state is stash_applied_consumed or stash_dropped_explicit_user_action.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the most recent stash mutation was invoked.

archived_at.description: Required (non-null) when stash_lifecycle_state is stash_archived_tombstone. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: stash_archived_tombstone MUST cite a non-null archived_at and MUST be null otherwise.
stash_applied_consumed and stash_dropped_explicit_user_action MUST cite a non-null approval_ticket_ref so the action is attributable.

stash_row_record.description: Row shape consumed by the stash list, the source-control panel, and the support / export bundle. Exactly one row per stash identity.

branch_row_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the branch_row_record or stash_row_record the event refers to. Stash-row events cite the stash_row_id through this slot.

stash_row_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the stash_row_record the event refers to (when the event is a stash-row event). Null on branch-row events.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when branch_row_audit_event_id_value is branch_row_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is branch_row_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

branch_row_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the branch_row stream.
